stage1.why_it_matters_short: Gives early kicks, stretches and turns room to happen.
stage1.why_it_matters_long: Your baby may kick, stretch, arch or wriggle when they are awake and comfortable. A clear low space gives them room to practise little body movements, while you stay close and keep raised surfaces out of the equation.

stage2.mapping_rationale: Added in the purchasing-depth pass because the source capture already contains a distinct product-family signal.
stage2.safety_note_public: Use only during awake, supervised play.

top_picks.title: Stylish & Supportive Playmat
top_picks.description: A high-density, cushioned, and reversible playmat that is easy to wipe clean and designed to complement modern interiors.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: Offers excellent cushioning and a wipe-clean surface, crucial for early movements and easy maintenance. The reversible design provides versatility and aesthetic appeal, making it a long-term investment.
top_picks.founder_lens: Premium price point, but strong reviews and brand reputation justify the cost for a long-lasting product. Ensure marketing highlights the newborn+ safety certification.

evidence.claim: 253 reviews, 4.8 rating (implied from overall brand reviews)

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Totter and Tumble Mariner playmat with high density cushioning, reversible faces and a wipe-clean surface that sits well in a lived in living room.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Floor play starts now with short tummy spells and supervised stretches on the ground. A cushioned wipe-clean mat protects knees and floors when milk appears. Reversible sides keep it looking intentional when guests walk through the living room after lunch at home.

top_picks.title: Practical Foldable Playmat
top_picks.description: A lightweight, reversible XPE foam playmat with an engaging road map design, perfect for tummy time and easy storage.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: Highly practical and affordable, offering a safe and stimulating surface for early play. Its foldable nature makes it convenient for small spaces and travel.
top_picks.founder_lens: Excellent value for money, strong retail proof. Highlight the ease of cleaning and portability for parents seeking convenience.

evidence.claim: £39.99, XPE non-toxic foam, reversible, wipe clean

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A lightweight Nuby foldable XPE foam playmat with a road map print on one side, easy to pack away after tummy time in smaller homes.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Not every mat needs to look like furniture in the living room. Foldable foam covers hard floors for early movement without a big spend. Pack it behind the sofa when the room needs to be a grown-up space again after bedtime stories.

top_picks.product_name: Etta Loves Plant Print Reversible Playmat
top_picks.title: Sensory Development Playmat
top_picks.description: An organic cotton playmat with scientifically inspired patterns designed to support babies' visual and cognitive development, reversible for different age stages.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: Its focus on sensory development with high-contrast patterns is ideal for newborns. The organic, machine-washable material ensures comfort and hygiene.
top_picks.founder_lens: Emphasize the developmental benefits and organic materials. Good for parents prioritizing early learning and natural products.

evidence.claim: Organic cotton outer, polyester padding, reversible, machine washable

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: An Etta Loves organic cotton reversible playmat with bold plant prints aimed at early looking, soft under tummy time and machine washable when spills happen.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Some mats are only padding. Etta Loves adds high-contrast pattern for the same short looking spells you do with cards. Soft cotton feels kinder on newborn skin, and a wash cycle sorts the inevitable dribble without much fuss at all.

top_picks.title: Thick & Minimalist Playmat
top_picks.description: A thick, non-toxic EVA foam puzzle playmat with a minimalist rainbow design, providing excellent cushioning for hard floors.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: Offers superior cushioning for safety and comfort during active play, while its minimalist design blends well with modern home decor.
top_picks.founder_lens: Good option for parents seeking extra padding and a stylish aesthetic. Highlight the thickness and non-toxic materials.
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Gus and Beau thick non-toxic EVA foam puzzle playmat with a simple rainbow design, giving soft cover on hard floors for early supervised play.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Hard tiles punish elbows during tummy time on cold floors. Thick puzzle foam softens the floor without a huge roll of mat. Interlocking tiles let you size the patch to the room and pull one piece aside for a wash if needed.

top_picks.title: Portable Large Playmat
top_picks.description: A large, reversible, wipe-clean playmat that easily rolls up for storage and portability, offering ample space for baby's movements.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: Its large size provides plenty of room for babies to explore and move, while its roll-up design makes it highly convenient for storage and travel.
top_picks.founder_lens: Good for parents needing a spacious yet portable option. Emphasize the ease of cleaning and storage.
top_picks.best_for_tag: Best for roll up floor space
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A large Skip Hop reversible wipe-clean playmat that rolls up for storage, giving a wide flat area for tummy time and early stretches on the floor.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Tiny mats feel cramped once both of you sit down. A larger surface that rolls up gives space to lie beside them without teetering on the edge. Wipe spills, roll it, and reclaim the floor when nap time returns again.

longlist.reason: High-density, cushioned, easy to wipe clean, reversible designs. Highly rated.
XPE non-toxic foam, reversible, wipe clean. Best overall budget-friendly option.

guidance_notes: For Totter + Tumble products, verify specific model availability and pricing on John Lewis as their website sometimes has different stock/offers. Ensure the 'washable' aspect is clearly communicated, as some are wipe-clean only, which is acceptable but should be noted.
For products listed as 'wipe-clean' rather than 'machine washable', ensure this distinction is clear in the product description to manage parent expectations.
Consider adding a note about the importance of checking dimensions for playmats, as 'standard' or 'compact' can vary significantly between brands and impact suitability for different home sizes.
